ordinanceLabel: SEMC Title 15 (Building, LA County Title 26 by ref) | Title 17 (Zoning) · ecode360 SO5015
buildingDept: City of South El Monte Building & Safety Division
buildingDeptNote: South El Monte operates its own Building & Safety Division. Permits are applied for through the city's Accela portal. Inspections on Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday with 24-hour advance notice required.
suggestedQuestions: How do I apply for a building permit in South El Monte?
What are the ADU rules in South El Monte?
What days does South El Monte do inspections?
Do I need a planning permit for a fence in South El Monte?
Who handles fire plan check in South El Monte?
What zones allow multi-family housing in South El Monte?
